rationale: Educ. Code §31.104 governs distribution and handling of instructional materials by school districts. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school may delegate to an employee the authority to requisition, distribute, and manage the inventory of instructional materials
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns instructional materials management, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
